overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour. The character travels along orange-tiled sidewalks past cyberpunk storefronts, under massive elevated highways, and across a busy intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and graffiti

events.description: woman in white shirt ahead stops to check her phone
camera passes the woman who stopped on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange sidewalk following a pedestrian, then passing her as she stops to check her phone

notable_agents.action: woman in white shirt and jeans walking ahead, then stopping to check her phone

entered.detail: large cyan neon sign with circular patterns reading SHINONOME CHRONOS
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and spray paint
distinctive orange diamond-plate textured metal pavement
massive concrete and steel overpass spanning the street ahead
yellow painted pole with electrical cables and fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny cyberpunk street with long golden hour shadows. The camera follows a woman in a white shirt past the prominent cyan SHINONOME CHRONOS neon sign and graffiti-covered walls. Around 6 seconds, the woman stops to check her phone, and the camera passes her, continuing down the orange-tiled sidewalk toward the elevated highway structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath the elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing straight under the overpass, passing other pedestrians walking in both directions

entered.detail: large illuminated screen displaying rotating advertisements
modern building with reflective blue-tinted windows
bags of garbage and debris stacked against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shadow of the massive elevated highway, transitioning from bright sunlight to a darker, neon-lit environment. Digital billboards glow overhead while the orange sidewalk continues. Trash piles line the right side of the path, and other pedestrians walk toward the camera in the shaded corridor.

events.description: stepping onto the yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
finishing crossing the street and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk, and continuing onto the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver car driving down the street and stopping at the intersection

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow and black diagonal stripes
vertical traffic signal pole showing red light
sleek silver vehicle with aerodynamic futuristic design
bright purple automated vending booth on the far sidewalk
multi-story building with green and yellow architectural trim

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass shadow, the character approaches a wide intersection with a prominent yellow-striped crosswalk. A futuristic car waits at the traffic light as the character crosses the street. After crossing, the character passes a distinctive purple vending machine and continues along the orange sidewalk into a new commercial area with different building architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny cyberpunk street that transitions into a shaded industrial corridor before emerging into a bright urban intersection. It begins in the glow of golden hour, following a woman in a white shirt past a cyan SHINONOME CHRONOS neon sign and graffiti-covered walls. As the woman stops to check her phone, the camera glides past her along an orange-tiled sidewalk, moving from the bright sunlight into the deep shadow of a massive elevated highway. The environment shifts to a darker, neon-lit corridor filled with glowing digital billboards and piles of trash before the camera exits the overpass and approaches a wide intersection with a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, after passing a waiting futuristic car and a purple vending machine, the camera continues along the orange pavement into a new commercial area with shifting architectural styles.
